subtitle: Track daily expenses & stay on budget

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's total spend vs daily budget as a progress ring, top 3 categories for the day, recent transactions list, and a floating quick-add button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-entry modal with large amount stepper (increment by $0.50), category picker grid with icons, payment method selector, optional merchant text field, and recurring toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped transaction list with category filter chips at top, swipe-to-delete, daily subtotals per section header, and a mini calendar heatmap showing spend intensity by day

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Rich analytics with category pie chart, daily spend bar chart for the current month, week-over-week trend comparison, top merchants ranking, budget adherence percentage, and AI-style spending insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all spending entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's spending broken down by category, sorted descending by amount

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all spending in the current Mon-Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all spending in the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyBudgetProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of todayTotal to dailyBudget goal (0.0 to 1.0+, can exceed 1.0 if over budget)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: underBudgetStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where total daily spend was at or below the daily budget, counting backwards from yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (thisWeekTotal - lastWeekTotal) / lastWeekTotal * 100. Negative means spending less.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyAverageThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: monthTotal divided by number of days elapsed in current month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The category with the highest total spend in the current month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, dailyTotal) pairs for each day of the current month, used for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For current month: each category with its total amount and percentage of monthTotal, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topMerchants
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 merchants by total spend this month: (merchantName, totalAmount, transactionCount)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: projectedMonthlySpend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: dailyAverageThisMonth * total days in current month — projects end-of-month total at current pace

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Up to 4 smart text insights: over/under budget alert, biggest category change vs last month, streak congratulation, projected monthly total warning

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recurringTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entries marked as recurring in the current month, representing fixed costs

dailyGoal.description: Daily spending budget — the target maximum amount to spend per day. Progress ring fills as spending approaches this limit. Green under 75%, yellow 75-100%, red over 100%.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the under-budget streak if the total spending for that day is less than or equal to the daily budget goal. Days with zero spending also count. The streak breaks on any day where spending exceeds the budget.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: compare current week's total spend to last week's total (weekOverWeekChange). Secondary: compare this month's daily average to last month's daily average. Tertiary: track per-category month-over-month changes to surface which categories are growing fastest.
insights: Budget status: 'You're $X under/over budget today' with contextual encouragement or warning
Category spike: 'Food & Dining is up 35% vs last month' when any category increases >20% month-over-month
Streak milestone: 'Nice! 7-day under-budget streak 🔥' at 3, 7, 14, 30 day milestones
Projection alert: 'At this pace, you'll spend $X this month' when projectedMonthlySpend exceeds monthly budget (dailyGoal * days in month) by >10%
Top merchant: 'You've spent $X at [merchant] this month — your #1 spot' for awareness
Savings opportunity: 'Your lowest-spend day this week was [day] at $X — can you beat it?' to gamify frugality
